section.title: Safety, Security, and Data Protection Considerations

para.emphasis: < Placeholder: this section is REQUIRED and MUST be the second to last numbered section in the document, right before Conformance. It contains information about safety, security, data protection, and privacy considerations. These can be divided up into separate subsections as desired. This document SHOULD have at least a security and data protection considerations section, and otherwise MUST have a blank section indicating "None." >
